creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #30)

Sounds great!

The LinuxKPI work will not support this (at least never in-tree) given it's a GPL-only driver in Linux.

I checked Kevin's link from Comment 21 [https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247545#c21] and the files I peeked at with head -n were GPL.

I have no idea what that means, I just cannot go near that code at this point.
